title: Saudia Fruit Salad
description: A refreshing dessert inspired by the flavors of Saudia Arabia. A mix of fresh fruits, perfect for any occasion.

ingredients.name: Mixed Fresh Fruits (e.g., strawberries, grapes, pineapple)

instructions: Wash the fruits and cut them into bite-sized pieces.
In a large bowl, mix together the honey, lemon juice, and fermented pineapple juice.
Add the cut fruits to the bowl and toss to coat with the honey and juice mixture.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Before serving, give the salad a good stir and adjust the sweetness and tartness to taste.
